canonical_board_map.claim_boundary: Canonical map is a visual evidence index, not CAD, photogrammetry, netlist, or safe cut geometry.

capture_coverage.claim_boundary: Capture coverage grades visual observability only; it cannot prove pinout, nets, voltage, or safe reuse.

lanes.request_prompt: Recapture the main components/connectors from another angle so single-photo claims can be cross-checked.
lanes.title: Cross-view confirmation

lanes.request_prompt: If accessible, capture the backside, solder side, cable underside, or hidden area so hidden routes and damage are not silently assumed.
lanes.title: Backside or hidden-area context

next_capture_requests.prompt: Recapture the main components/connectors from another angle so single-photo claims can be cross-checked.
If accessible, capture the backside, solder side, cable underside, or hidden area so hidden routes and damage are not silently assumed.

reconstruction_summary.source_policy: Repeated visual observations raise candidate confidence but do not prove pinout, nets, voltage, or safe reuse.
